creator: tom.km5vy@gmail.com
text:
Indeed, doing

pkg_delete -f qt4-dbus'*'
cd /usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4/ && make && make install clean
portupgrade -r qt4-dbus

did allow me to get past this issue.  Presumably the problem is that
the existing
installed headers are being found before those appropriate to the new version.
